'''''Masters of Role Playing'' 8''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[2000]] with a cover provided by [[Lucasfilm]]'s [[Stephen J. Sansweet]].<ref name="MORP" /> It contained many roleplaying articles, including a rules supplement for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Light Saber Fighting Techniques]]" and was written by [[Criss Rosenlof]].<ref name="MORPfeatures">{{WebCite|url=http://mastersrpg.com/masters8/MORP8_features_tofc.html|text=M.O.R.P. #8 -- Features|archivedate=20000602125410|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20000602125410/http://mastersrpg.com/masters8/MORP8_features_tofc.html|nolive=1}}</ref>
